name: reference-pass

## Overview

Lookup tables for the Example API, current as of 2026-06-11 (covers v2.3).

## Endpoints

| Method | Path | Purpose |
|--------|------|---------|
| GET | /things | List things |
| POST | /things | Create a thing |

## Pricing

| Tier | Price |
|------|-------|
| Free | $0 |
| Pro | $20 |

## Rate Limits

60 requests per minute on Free, 600 on Pro.

## Error Codes

400 bad request, 401 unauthorized, 429 rate limited.

## Changelog Pointers

Track breaking changes in the vendor changelog before upgrading.
